findings.evidence: Lines 53-54 add source and target pretransitivity assumptions; `FiberTransport.lean:101` proves `fiberMap_smul`, `FiberTransport.lean:242` proves `mem_orbit_fiberMap_iff`, and Mathlib `GroupAction/Transitive.lean:64` has `IsPretransitive.of_surjective_map` for transporting pretransitivity.
findings.fix: State the local theorem with only the source fibre nonempty/pretransitive hypotheses, derive the target instances from `fiberMap`/`fiberMap_smul` (or `mem_orbit_fiberMap_iff`), and then define the target `fiberTorsorOfPretransitive`.
findings.issue: `fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv_of_pretransitive` assumes `[Nonempty (q ⁻¹' {b})] [MulAction.IsPretransitive (Deck q) (q ⁻¹' {b})]`, but these target-fibre facts follow from the source nonempty/pretransitive hypotheses along `fiberMap h hpq b`.

findings.evidence: Lines 107-108, 122-123, and 135-136 all take both `hsurj` and `hsurjq`; `FiberTransport.lean:101-103` gives `fiberMap h hpq b (φ • e) = conjMulEquiv h hpq φ • fiberMap h hpq b e`, which transports each source surjectivity witness to the target.
findings.fix: Remove `hsurjq` from `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_symm_fiberMap`, `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_fiberMap`, and `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_fiberMap_coe`; construct it internally from `hsurj`, `conjMulEquiv h hpq`, and `fiberMap_smul`.
findings.issue: The three `deckEquivFiberOfSurjective_*` local lemmas require `hsurjq`, although surjectivity of `ψ ↦ ψ • fiberMap h hpq b e` is obtained from `hsurj` by conjugating the source witness and applying `fiberMap_smul`.

summary: The new local transport API carries target transitivity/surjectivity assumptions that are transported automatically from the source data by the existing fibre-map equivariance lemmas. This leaves the statements less general than the natural Mathlib/TauCeti level.
